info.title: CollisionSpike Inspection-Address Matching
info.description: Custom connector over the inspection-address matching Azure Function (ROADMAP 4a). Resolves a Case's part-postcode Loc (a district such as CH5) to a known yard's full address by matching the corpus on district startswith(outwardCode), then serialises it to the EVA inspection-address field (6 newline-separated lines). Honours AZURE_MAPS_ENABLED: false (M1 default) normalises postcodes via the keyless postcode.io; true defers to a future Azure Maps path. Stateless — the Power Automate flow passes the candidate InspectionAddress + Repairer rows in the body so the flow stays the sole Dataverse caller. Advisory: always returns 200; never silently emits 'Image Based Assessment' (that requires an explicit reviewer decision + reason).

post.summary: Match a Case Loc to an inspection address (EVA field 9)
post.description: Given a Case Loc + principal code and the district-filtered corpus rows, returns the resolved 6-line inspection address when a unique principal-linked site matches, otherwise the ranked candidates plus needsReviewerDecision. Always returns 200 with a warnings array; matching never blocks intake.

CorpusRow.description: A candidate known site (Repairer or InspectionAddress reference row). Accepts Dataverse column names (cr1bd_addressline1..6, cr1bd_postcode, cr1bd_name) or bare contract keys (addressLine1..6 / line1..6, postcode, name/label). principalCode / principalCodes carry the linked WorkProvider code(s).

ReviewerDecision.description: Optional explicit human decision. choice=image_based REQUIRES a non-empty reason (no silent image-based). choice=use_candidate picks candidateIndex from the ranked list. choice=manual_address supplies addressLines + postcode.

caseLoc.description: The Case's Loc — a part postcode (district, e.g. CH5) or a full postcode.

principalCode.description: The Case's provider / principal code (e.g. DFD) used to disambiguate district-shared yards.

inspectionAddresses.description: Corpus InspectionAddress reference rows, ideally pre-filtered to the district by the flow.

repairers.description: Corpus Repairer rows, ideally pre-filtered to the district by the flow.

exactDistrict.description: Outward code equals the Case district.

inspectionAddress.description: EVA field 9 — six newline-separated lines, or the literal 'Image Based Assessment', or null when a reviewer decision is still needed.

matched.description: True when an address was auto-resolved without a human.

needsReviewerDecision.description: True when a human must choose a candidate or record an image-based decision (+reason).

candidates.description: Ranked known sites in the Case district (principal-linked first).

warnings.description: Human-readable advisories (e.g. no match, postcode.io unconfirmed).

apiKeyHeader.name: x-functions-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Azure Functions host/function key. Stored as a connection secret in Power Platform, never in this spec.
